customAttributes.description:
When Arboreal Alliance enters the battlefield, create an X/X green Treefolk creature token.
Whenever you attack with one or more Elves, populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"First name the four, the free peoples:
Eldest of all, the elf-children . . ."
—Long List of the Ents
